metadata.description: Name which is used to generate a short unique hash for each resource

configuration.ingress: [if(parameters('ingressEnabled'), createObject('external', parameters('external'), 'targetPort', parameters('targetPort'), 'transport', 'auto', 'allowInsecure', false(), 'corsPolicy', createObject('allowedOrigins', createArray('*'), 'allowedHeaders', createArray('*'), 'maxAge', 0, 'allowCredentials', false())), null())]
configuration.dapr: [if(parameters('daprEnabled'), createObject('enabled', true(), 'appId', parameters('daprAppId'), 'appProtocol', parameters('daprAppProtocol'), 'appPort', if(parameters('ingressEnabled'), parameters('targetPort'), 0)), createObject('enabled', false()))]

proxyInternalUrl.value: [format('https://{0}.internal.{1}', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}-rg', parameters('name'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'proxy'), '2025-04-01').outputs.SERVICE_PROXY_NAME.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}-rg', parameters('name'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'container-apps'), '2025-04-01').outputs.defaultDomain.value)]

env.value: [flatten(createArray(createArray(createObject('name', 'EncryptionKey', 'secretRef', 'encryption-key'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'StorageAccountName', 'value', parameters('storageAccountName')), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'secretRef', 'app-insights-connection-string'), createObject('name', 'ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS_ENABLED', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'RegistrationUrl', 'value', parameters('registrationUrl')), createObject('name', 'ProxyInternalUrl', 'value', parameters('proxyInternalUrl'))), if(not(empty(parameters('entraClientId'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureAd__Instance', 'value', environment().authentication.loginEndpoint), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__TenantId', 'value', parameters('entraTenantId')), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__ClientId', 'value', parameters('entraClientId')), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__CallbackPath', 'value', '/signin-oidc')), createArray())))]
